chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-5976 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge DIRECTION. For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 09.03.2023. Mr. Muhammad Islam Leghari, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - All the prayers advanced by the Petitioner are directed towards the Respondents No.6 to 8, who are private individuals, hence are not amenable to issuance of a writ under Article 199 of the Constitution. Furthermore, no explanation has been forthcoming as to why the remedies otherwise available under the law have not been exercised in relation to those persons. That being so, we are of the view that the Petition is misconceived and dismiss the same accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
